operation.notes: Observed in a local media library. DMHY LoliHouse titles explicitly include S2, and local files are under Season 2; Bangumi subject 638151 is the 2026-07 second season. The bare Hell Mode alias is intentionally not contributed.
operation.title: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～ 2nd Season
